title: Ability to invite Guest to workspace.
excerpt:
Is it possible to invite Guests to the whole workspace? When I invite Guest for each board, the Guest view looses the structure and all team specific boards are shown as mixed up. 
Thanks,

posts.author: Soko (Soko)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is it possible to invite Guests to the whole workspace? When I invite Guest for each board, the Guest view looses the structure and all team specific boards are shown as mixed up.

Thanks,

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Soko! Currently, the ability to subscribe guests to a workspace is not supported. As of now, guests can only be directly subscribed to the boards that you wish for them to be a part of.

That said, our product team is eager for this kind of feedback to include in their discussions for future improvement. This feedback can be submitted directly to a dedicated section of our community page. Learn more here
